sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69300" key="murio/trhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡρῐό-τρητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n69300.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with numberless holes</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄγγεα μ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">honeycombs</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:174" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">174</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
